function.message: Done — I created the reminder email to Erik Blom at Blue Harbor Bank with the requested subject and message body, saved as outbox/84848.json, and advanced outbox sequence to 84849.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed AGENTS.md rule to send outbound emails by writing to outbox. Followed outbox/README.MD invariants: used concrete recipient email from canonical contact record, wrote exactly one new numbered file using current seq id, set sent=false, then bumped seq.json.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical recipient email was verified in contacts/cont_004.json (Erik Blom). Outbox format and sequence rules were verified in outbox/README.MD and applied using outbox/seq.json pre-bump id 84848, resulting in outbox/84848.json and seq increment to 84849.
